title: Stratagems
body:
Welcome fellow Helldiver, as you might have noticed currently there are no efficient ways of liberating and efficiently spreading Democracy. Luckily for the Overworld, the Ministry of Truth has officially deployed Super Destroyers all over Minecraft's Stratosphere allowing you to use Stratagems from Eagle, they're in your hands for use and to spread managed democracy.

The Ministry of Truth has deployed 8 Stratagems for you Helldivers to use. The list is shown on your HUD when having the "Resupply Stratagems" Item equipped in your hand, you can also find one below.

Did you make a mistake? Don't worry Helldiver, you can right-click the "Resupply Stratagems" Item and it will reset.

Are you ready to Join the Helldivers? Good to hear, because you're overqualified and ready to spread liberty, all you have to do is go into chat and write the command "/joinhelldivers" and General Brasch will personally give you the "Resupply Stratagems" Item for you to keep!

Remember Helldiver, you're the last line of offense against all of those who oppose liberty and democracy!

 

FAQ

Q: Can anyone be a Helldiver?
A: Yes.
Q: Can Helldivers use Stratagems in Modpacks?
A: Yes, both personal and commercial modpacks.
Q: More stratagems?
A: The Ministry of Truth is currently developing more Stratagems as the Galactic War progresses further.
Q: The stratagems are too destructive!
A: The explosions are controlled by the gamerule "mobGriefing" which can be False or True
Q: Can I make the Stratagems stronger/weaker more precisely?
A: Of course! You can change the Explosion Power using gamerules
Q: I can't throw the Stratagems far enough!
A: Ministry of Truth got you covered, that can also be changed using gamerules
